newsArray.title: Ricky Martin to perform at T20 World Cup closing ceremony; ICC announces player of the tournament nominees
newsArray.description: The International Cricket Council (ICC) has confirmed that Puerto Rican singer Ricky Martin will perform at the closing ceremony of the T20 World Cup, scheduled to take place ahead of the final match.
creator: web desk

newsArray.title: India eye T20 history, New Zealand hunt maiden World Cup
newsArray.description: AHMEDABAD (Reuters) : India’s bid to become the first team to retain the Twenty20 World Cup will collide with New Zealand’s quest for a maiden global white-ball crown when the finalists step on to the field at the world’s largest cricket stadium on Sunday. The 20-team tournament will end in an Ahmedabad amphitheatre where more [...]

newsArray.title: Ricky Martin set to light up T20 World Cup 2026 final ceremony in Ahmedabad
newsArray.description: Defending champions India will face New Zealand in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 final. Global superstar Ricky Martin will headline the closing ceremony, performing his Latin pop hits before the highly anticipated match at Ahmedabad's Narendra Modi Stadium. India reached the final after a semifinal win against England.
creator: willow sports

newsArray.title: 'Shivam Dube 2.0': Rohit Sharma’s advice sparks match-changing knock vs England
newsArray.description: Team India's unconventional batting order paid dividends in the T20 World Cup semi-final. Shivam Dube's mature knock at number four, expertly handling spinner Adil Rashid, proved pivotal. His calculated approach, focusing on singles and punishing loose deliveries, eased pressure and set a strong foundation for India's commanding total against England.
creator: arnab mukherji
